issues_found: Theorem 2 (Cumulative Alignment Bound) validated but result is NEGATIVE: bar_delta vs gen_gap Spearman rho=-0.379, p=0.121 (not significant); sup_delta vs gen_gap rho=0.045, p=0.858 (not significant). Neither cumulative nor worst-case alignment predicts generalization. Paper currently claims bound 'strictly improves on worst-case analysis' -- this is empirically unsupported.

Lyapunov function V_t empirically INCREASES throughout training, directly contradicting Theorem 1's guarantee V_{t+1} <= V_t. Paper hand-waves this as 'dominated by mu_t*||w_t||^2 term.' Task fix_lyapunov_definition is in task_plan but not yet executed (status: not started, depends_on: []).

Paper scope STILL narrower than claimed: abstract promises 105 experiments, 7 methods, 2 optimizers, 2 architectures, but paper body evaluates only ResNet-20 with AdamW on CIFAR-10/100. VGG-16-BN data exists (iter_005, 4 methods x 3 seeds, phi spread 0.16%) and task integrate_vgg_data exists in task_plan but is not yet executed. Figures now include multi_arch_comparison.pdf but paper text does not reference it.

Theory-experiment optimizer mismatch: ALL theorems assume SGD dynamics. ALL experiments use AdamW. PMP-WD costate derived for SGD momentum but applied to AdamW. Paper now has SGD experiments (iter_003) but these are NOT referenced in current paper.md (paper was rewritten in iter_007 without SGD section).

CIFAR-100 data provenance mismatch persists: 5 of 6 methods' CIFAR-100 data from iter_003, PMP-WD from iter_006. Different code versions. Writing review flags this as Critical -- numbers cannot be independently verified from current workspace.

Figure 1 is STILL a markdown placeholder. Writing review scores Visual Communication 5/10. certified_band.png/pdf and theorem2_validation.png now exist in writing/figures/ but are not referenced in paper.md. Paper references 6 figures but some reference filenames that don't match actual files.

Four appendices cited in main text (B.1 Theorem 1 proof, B.3 PMP-WD derivation, B.4 RG derivation, A.3 CSI sensitivity) -- none exist. 5th consecutive iteration flagging this. Writing review: 'Appendix A referenced but no appendix exists.'

Theorem numbering non-sequential: Theorems appear as 1, 3, 2, 4 in text. CIFAR-100 spread reported as 0.76pp (abstract), 0.58pp (Section 6.2), 0.76pp (Section 7.1). Random mask (90.12%) cited in Section 7.3 but absent from tables.

Paper's Phi Invariance Conjecture abstract claims 105 experiments across 2 optimizers, 2 architectures -- but paper body has only ResNet-20/AdamW. The abstract-body disconnect will be flagged by any reviewer reading past the first page.

PMP-WD framing still misleading: paper says 'consistent with optimality' but p=0.12 (not significant), method ordering reversed between iter_003 and iter_006. Cohen's d formula still mislabeled (paired vs unpaired). Banned phrase 'to our knowledge' variant in Section 2.6.
issues_fixed: Theorem 2 now has empirical validation data: 18 data points (6 methods x 3 seeds) with bar_delta, sup_delta, gen_gap computed. Spearman correlations calculated. Scatter plot generated (theorem2_validation.png). Resolves the 'zero validation' gap from iter_006, though the result is negative.

Certified band visualization now exists: certified_band.png/pdf generated showing [lambda_min(t), lambda_max(t)] with method trajectories. Resolves the 'no visualization for central contribution' gap from iter_006.
Paper fully rewritten with unified Phi Invariance Conjecture framing, incorporating multi-optimizer (AdamW + SGD) narrative in abstract. Writing quality scored 8/10 by writing review.
Figure count increased from placeholder+4 to 12+ actual figure files including multi_arch_comparison, theorem2_validation, certified_band, SGD comparison.
